channel.title: Microsoft Foundry NextGen on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft Foundry NextGen on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: Document PII playground sample in Microsoft Foundry NextGen
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry NextGen now includes a public preview playground for document-based PII detection in Azure AI Language. The sample loads a prepared document, runs document PII detection, and displays the redacted output.

  • Source: Azure Updates
